name: Mirror Image Internet: A Pioneer in Content Distribution Network Services
description: Frictionless Data Package for Aberdeen Group profile (May 2004) of Mirror Image Internet, a CDN provider in Woburn MA. Highlights its Content Access Point architecture for centralized-yet-distributed content delivery, with two customer case studies (Fastclick and an international toy retailer) validating cost savings, performance gains, and responsive service. Examines Mirror Image's Smart Content platform for XML-based rules-driven adaptive content delivery.
